## Analyzers (1)

### [Lookyloo_Screenshot v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Lookyloo/Lookyloo.json)
Take a screenshot of an url, domain, FQDN or IP and report all HTTP redirections

- **Author:** THA-CERT - PVA
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `url`, `domain`, `fqdn`, `ip`
